07eb9ce97e2db7a8.exposure_thesis: WHOLESALE YORKSHIRE WINES LTD appears to import wine or spirits from European producers, paying in EUR and selling in GBP to UK trade customers. GBP weakness directly squeezes margin on every shipment. UK businesses paying EUR supplier invoices — wine merchants buying from French châteaux, food importers sourcing from Italian producers, furniture buyers paying German manufacturers — face rising GBP costs as sterling weakens. 24551566f1d406a5.exposure_thesis: BENNY’S WINE MERCHANTS LTD appears to import wine or spirits from European producers, paying in EUR and selling in GBP to UK trade customers. GBP weakness directly squeezes margin on every shipment. Currency exposure: GBP/EUR.

UK businesses paying EUR supplier invoices — wine merchants buying from French châteaux, food importers sourcing from Italian producers, furniture buyers paying German manufacturers — face rising GBP costs as sterling weakens. Currency exposure: GBP/EUR.
941d754b4cc0de62.fx_reason: Consistent EUR outflows for stock purchases vs GBP inflows from UK customers. Every rate move creates a margin gap unless hedged.
941d754b4cc0de62.fx_payment_logic: UK businesses paying EUR supplier invoices — wine merchants buying from French châteaux, food importers sourcing from Italian producers, furniture buyers paying German manufacturers — face rising GBP costs as sterling weakens.
941d754b4cc0de62.sales_angle: With GBP weakening vs EUR, UK food importers paying European suppliers are seeing their cost base rise on every shipment while GBP selling prices stay fixed.

8204f6e642f61588.segment_name: UK food manufacturers sourcing USD commodities
8204f6e642f61588.segment_business_model: UK food manufacturer buying USD-priced agricultural commodities (grain, soy, cocoa, sugar) or packaging from overseas and selling finished goods in GBP
8204f6e642f61588.why_affected: USD strengthening on Iran tensions means their commodity procurement costs rise in GBP terms. For manufacturers with fixed-price contracts or retail customers, margin compression is immediate.
8204f6e642f61588.trigger_headline: US-Iran tensions escalate — USD strengthens as safe-haven demand rises
scoring_reasons: Segment exposure: Very High — USD commodity import cost exposure
8204f6e642f61588.exposure_thesis: FOOD INTERNATIONAL LTD appears to manufacture food products using internationally sourced commodities priced in USD. USD strengthening on Iran tensions means their next commodity purchase costs more in GBP, directly compressing margin. When USD strengthens against GBP, every UK business paying a USD invoice needs more pounds to cover the same cost — this is direct margin erosion for importers. Currency exposure: GBP/USD.
8204f6e642f61588.fx_reason: High-volume recurring USD payments for raw materials with GBP-denominated finished goods sales. Margin sensitivity is significant at scale.
8204f6e642f61588.fx_payment_logic: When USD strengthens against GBP, every UK business paying a USD invoice needs more pounds to cover the same cost — this is direct margin erosion for importers.
8204f6e642f61588.sales_angle: With USD strengthening on Iran tensions, UK food manufacturers buying commodity inputs in USD are seeing their raw material costs rise in GBP terms right now.
8204f6e642f61588.suggested_next_step: Call Grzegorz Pawel Purzycki (director) — With USD strengthening on Iran tensions, UK food manufacturers buying commodity inputs in USD are seeing their raw material costs rise in GBP terms right now.

01d9942719dfbac1.why_affected: USD strengthening on Iran tensions means their commodity procurement costs rise in GBP terms. For manufacturers with fixed-price contracts or retail customers, margin compression is immediate.
01d9942719dfbac1.trigger_headline: US-Iran tensions escalate — USD strengthens as safe-haven demand rises
scoring_reasons: Segment exposure: Very High — USD commodity import cost exposure
Director found: Richard Charles Newton Jones
01d9942719dfbac1.exposure_thesis: SNOW FOODS (MANUFACTURING) LIMITED appears to manufacture food products using internationally sourced commodities priced in USD. USD strengthening on Iran tensions means their next commodity purchase costs more in GBP, directly compressing margin. When USD strengthens against GBP, every UK business paying a USD invoice needs more pounds to cover the same cost — this is direct margin erosion for importers. Currency exposure: GBP/USD.
01d9942719dfbac1.fx_reason: High-volume recurring USD payments for raw materials with GBP-denominated finished goods sales. Margin sensitivity is significant at scale.
01d9942719dfbac1.fx_payment_logic: When USD strengthens against GBP, every UK business paying a USD invoice needs more pounds to cover the same cost — this is direct margin erosion for importers.
01d9942719dfbac1.sales_angle: With USD strengthening on Iran tensions, UK food manufacturers buying commodity inputs in USD are seeing their raw material costs rise in GBP terms right now.
01d9942719dfbac1.suggested_next_step: Call Richard Charles Newton Jones (director) — With USD strengthening on Iran tensions, UK food manufacturers buying commodity inputs in USD are seeing their raw material costs rise in GBP terms right now.

b1ff999d2976892e.company_name: FOX FITZGERALD WHISKY TRADING COMPANY LIMITED
b1ff999d2976892e.segment_name: Scotch whisky and premium spirits exporters
b1ff999d2976892e.segment_business_model: UK spirits producer exporting to US and other global markets, billing in USD, converting revenue back to GBP
b1ff999d2976892e.exposure_type: Export USD revenue exposure + tariff risk
b1ff999d2976892e.why_affected: US tariff uncertainty means pricing pressure from two directions: tariff pass-through risk AND USD conversion risk when GBP/USD moves against them.
b1ff999d2976892e.trigger_headline: US Section 338 tariff risk remains — UK exporters to America face ongoing pricing uncertainty
scoring_reasons: Segment exposure: Very High — Export USD revenue exposure + tariff ris
b1ff999d2976892e.exposure_thesis: FOX FITZGERALD WHISKY TRADING COMPANY LIMITED appears to export premium spirits to the US, receiving USD revenue that must be converted back to GBP. US tariff uncertainty compounds the currency conversion risk — if USD weakens while tariffs land, margin is squeezed from both sides. UK exporters billing US customers in USD receive fewer pounds when they convert their USD revenue — tariff uncertainty compounds the FX risk on their US income. Currency exposure: GBP/USD.
b1ff999d2976892e.fx_reason: Large and recurring USD revenue streams that must be converted to GBP. If USD weakens while tariffs land, the margin impact compounds from both sides simultaneously.
b1ff999d2976892e.fx_payment_logic: UK exporters billing US customers in USD receive fewer pounds when they convert their USD revenue — tariff uncertainty compounds the FX risk on their US income.
b1ff999d2976892e.sales_angle: US tariff uncertainty and GBP/USD volatility create a double risk for Scotch exporters — worth reviewing how you're converting USD export revenue given the current uncertainty.
b1ff999d2976892e.suggested_next_step: Call Eamonn Fitzgerald Jones (director) — US tariff uncertainty and GBP/USD volatility create a double risk for Scotch exporters — worth reviewing how you're converting USD export revenue given the current uncertainty.
